Video.summary: From the searing sands of the Moroccan Sahara, where the Marathon Des Sables pushes the limits of human endurance, to the desolate, frozen expanses of the Antarctic, where 55 courageous souls brave the Ice Marathon. Witness the ultimate tests of spirit against nature's most extreme canvases.
Video.title: | Marathon Des Sables
